schema.description:
This serializer is responsible for validating the data sent by the SDK
when the user submits the token.

session_id.description: The unique identifier of the payment session. Provided in CheckoutSDK init `session_id`.

token.description: Use this field to provide the unique identifier of a saved customer card for processing a payment in the API request.

cvv.description: Input the 3 or 4-digit Card Verification Value (CVV) found on the back of the credit/debit card. This may be required for new card transactions or certain token transactions to verify the card's authenticity.

schema.title: SubmitToken
